author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

Motivated by https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51096 this PR extends the ModuleAllocMonitor tests to cover modules that use the ExternalWork and/or Transformer extensions. Following this PR at least the script producing the circles JSON files need to be extended to show these details.

First commit fixes the ModuleAllocMonitor for jobs that don't have any ESModules.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2264

#### PR validation:

Tests succeed.
title: Extend ModuleAllocMonitor testing to modules that use ExternalWork and/or Transformer
